name: Chocolate Cheesecake#3
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Graham cracker crumbs, finely crushed
1 package Chocolate pudding mix and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press into the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a saucepan, combine pudding mix, sugar, milk, and chocolate. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil. Remove from heat and cover with waxed paper.
3. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Add yolks, vanilla, salt, and the cooked pudding mixture. Mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
5. Pour the batter over the crumbs in the pan.
6. Bake on the lowest rack of the oven at 425°F for about 35 minutes or until the center is set lightly when touched.
7. Cool completely for 4 hours.
8. Spread sour cream over the top before serving.
